name: Luoyang Jianlong Micro-nano New Material Co., Ltd
summary: Luoyang Jianlong Micro-nano New Material Co., Ltd is a China-based company that focuses on the research, development, production, and sales of micro-nano new materials. The company's products are used in various industries, including electronics, aerospace, and chemical engineering. Luoyang Jianlong Micro-nano New Material Co., Ltd is headquartered in China.
